rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL

results.reason: Source-domain Trapani wiki; only kw 'trapani salt pan' matches; sem/func below threshold.

fail_reason: Speculative Cascade with Cheap Verifier (arxiv 2603.03251) hits both sem (0.80>=0.7) and func (0.84>=0.7) thresholds; its cheap-verifier-alternating-with-expensive-LLM cascade collides with PECDP's alternating cheap passive/expensive LLM stages, so the candidate is not novel.
